translation: form of address, salutation, greeting (vocative case)
term of stay (in a country or city)
country cottage (usually in the mountains or forest)
someone who lives and works in a castle
a building that you’ve squatted in
figure, character (in a novel or film)
sore throat (to have a sore throat)
slippers (for wearing inside the apartment after you take your shoes off)
writer of texts (song lyrics, ad copy)
